title: dendrorkis purpurea
side_effects: Dendrorkis purpurea can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Overuse of the plant's extracts can also lead to kidney damage and liver toxicity, resulting in symptoms such as dark urine, pale skin, and fatigue. In severe cases, improper use of Dendrorkis purpurea can cause respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and allergic reactions, which may necessitate medical attention. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any plant extracts, as they can be potentially hazardous if not used correctly.
